title: Onigashima Moves Toward the Climax
description: On pages 33–36, this part focuses on Unknown person #33, Unknown person #34, Straw Hat Pirates, Queen, Unknown person #35, Yamato as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As another man working in the food trade, I idolized him from the bottom of my heart!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: had anyone discovered I had this poster, I'd have been sent straight to jail, but every night I'd admired it nonetheless.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I EVEN STARTED CALLING HIM "BIG BRO SANJ!" IN MY MIND.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think I'd get to meet him in person! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Um! Ah! B-B-Buh- Bwig... uh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The gorgeous golden locks. The swirling eyebrows. It's him, no doubt! Ahn, he's so stylish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Agh! Couldn't get the words out right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Uh, what's wrong? You're acting weird.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: RSTL :

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Stop right there, you craven scoundrels! (Whispers)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you know in whose distinguished presence you stand?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Though born in the north ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...He drifted with the tides to be raised in the east!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On his shoulders rests the title of Chef!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: An impress- give introduction-tory speech.

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: He's the straw hats' greatest flirt!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: "Black leg" Sanji! (Whispers)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't stand a chance with either flavor or fist!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Turn tail and run while you still can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: A BOUNTY OF 330 million?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: You never saw this poster.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you'll never speak of it to any- one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Am I clear?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: His most intimi- dating face yet! :o

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: AAh, look at it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: WHAT A MANLY IT CHOPPING TECHNIGUE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Even if sliced to bits...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...I could never com- plain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: The results are clear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Doom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Ruu- Uun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: That guy's a monster!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
